untriaged_notes.text: T4 Phase 1 Blocker: Cortex integration unavailable. Cortex API (https://cortex.getempirica.com) reachable + authenticated, but no accessible SER creation method: HTTP endpoints 404, MCP CLI not found, empirica CLI lacks command. mesh-support pre-flight passed but blocked on infrastructure gap. Escalation document: PHASE_1_BLOCKER_ESCALATION.md. Awaiting Zone 2 guidance.
